text: The second surgery was Izzy, a 14 year old chow mix who had a soft tissue sarcoma near, right in between the 8th and 9th rib.
So we did a rib resection of 7, 8, 9, and 10 on the left side in order to try to get clean margins.
And then we did a reconstruction of the chest wall with
both the biosys as well as a latissimus dorsi flap.
